preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Pap Smear' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'pap smear'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Pap Smear' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Fresh Frozen Tissue' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'fresh frozen tissue'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Fresh Frozen Tissue' AND description = 'sampleType name')

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'pap smear'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'pap smear'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 6, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'pap smear';

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Pathology'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'fresh frozen tissue'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'fresh frozen tissue'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 7, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'Pathology' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'fresh frozen tissue';
